title: Rose Gold Balloons, 100Pcs 12 Inch Metallic Chrome Rose Gold Latex Balloons for Men Women Birthday Baby Shower Anniversary Graduation Engagement Party Decorations
features: 100 PCS Balloons: The package comes with 12-inch metallic rose gold balloons (100 pcs) and 2 roll 10m ribbons, allowing you to create a visually striking and captivating atmosphere that will leave your guests in awe

Balloon Decoration: Our party balloons are made from premium latex materials, ensuring exceptional and durability, not easy to burst. These latex balloons are designed to hold their shape and color for an extended period, guaranteeing a long-lasting and impressive display for your event

Easy to Assemble: The Teselife balloons are suitableto be inflated yourself. These balloons can be filled with air and helium. The balloon set also includes two ribbons, so you can easily make a balloon bouquet, let your little ones run happily with it, or let your family or friends take beautiful photos with the balloon garland arch kit

Wide Application: The balloon set is suitable for birthdays, baby showers, weddings, anniversaries, graduation, Eid Mubarak, New Year party, Christmas party, engagements, bridal showers, bride for gift showers, hen party decorations, Easter party, Little Mermaid party and so on

Warm Tips: Please note that there might be a slight color difference because of different devices (Mobiile, Laptop, etc) or light effects, the actual color might differ from the listing images. Also please do not judge the colors without inflating the balloons, as it may be very different from the actual color
